testcase.name: test_requires_auth

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected auth error, got 200 assert 200 in [401, 403, 422] + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_plan_endpoints.py:91: in test_requires_auth assert resp.status_code in [401, 403, 422], f"Expected auth error, got {resp.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected auth error, got 200 E assert 200 in [401, 403, 422] E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
